pom.xml.general_idea: Change the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 APIs, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing runtime issues if Java 21-specific APIs are used in code.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit release configuration to the maven-compiler-plugin configuration block.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiler plugin explicitly targets Java 21, overriding or reinforcing the property setting for the build process.
